notes: C-prime 鏈存量健檢全過:(1) ds-canonical/fork/ 齊備(manifest.json + hooks×19 + launchers{fork-governance-dispatcher.sh, inject_fork_governance_preamble.sh, settings-hooks.json} + governance.lock + preamble.md + skills);(2) manifest(beta.84 built 2026-07-14)所列 18 sourceHooks 全在 shipped hooks dir;2026-07-15 唯一 hook 改動 check_datatable_invariants.sh 非 fork-shipped → manifest 不 stale;(3) 3 個 shipped copy 與 .claude/hooks 原檔 diff = build-fork-governance.mjs 刻意 path rewrite(packages/design-system/src → node_modules/@qijenchen/design-system/src)非 drift;(4) r2 raw URL org ajenchen 與 git remote 一致;(5) OBSOLETE_HOOKS(block_production_edit_without_plugin/check_plugin_bootstrap/check_governance_bootstrap)主動移除機制在 refresh-fork-launchers.mjs:49 ✓;(6) mirror ALLOWLIST 含 refresh-fork-launchers.mjs + fork-governance-dispatcher.sh(build-published-template-mirror.mjs:68,255)✓。apps/template 無 .claude 屬 by-design(在 DS repo 內 r1 早退;launchers 由 mirror/sync-all 進 fork repo)。
